-- 4 of 6 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to actually scale your
Facebook Ads by finding new audiences and markets
that may be interested in your product/products. I
recommend a low budget strategy because all we’re
trying to do here is prove concept and scale within the
audiences that we’re going for.
LESSON:
PROSPECTING: AUDIENCE
TESTING
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	If you’re looking for more scale, launch your
Low-Budget Audience Testing.
